channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists Identify Possible Brain Mechanism Behind Chronic Pain
item.description: Researchers have identified a region deep in the brain that may determine whether pain becomes chronic, potentially opening new directions for treatment.

item.title: Researchers Identify Mystery Object Found Two Miles Below the Ocean Surface
item.description: A deep-sea golden orb discovered in the Gulf of Alaska puzzled scientists for more than two years before researchers were finally able to determine its origin.

item.title: Podcast: Photonic Quantum Chips and the Future of Computing
item.description: NSF-supported researcher Milos Popovic discusses a project that has successfully integrated a photonic quantum system into a conventional electronic chip architecture.

item.title: Newly Discovered Prehistoric Mammal Sheds Light on Post-Extinction Survival
item.description: The fossil of Cimolodon desosai, a small mammal species, may help explain how some life forms endured the mass extinction event that wiped out the dinosaurs.
